name: RSPO SCCS 2020 v1
description: RSPO Supply Chain Certification Standard 2020 — covers identity preservation, segregation, mass balance, and book-and-claim models for tracking certified sustainable palm oil through the supply chain.

requirements.name: Certified Volume Tracking (Clause 5.3)
requirements.description: The quantity of certified product dispatched does not exceed the quantity of certified product received during the same period.
requirements.guidanceText: Maintain a mass balance register reconciling certified inputs and outputs per period. Volumes must be traceable in PalmTrace. Negative balances are not permitted.

requirements.name: Certified Supplier Verification (Clause 4.2)
requirements.description: All certified palm oil is purchased only from RSPO-certified suppliers whose certificates are current and cover the relevant supply chain model.
requirements.guidanceText: Check supplier RSPO certificate validity on the RSPO website or PalmTrace before each transaction. Retain certificate copies for audit.

requirements.name: Segregation Procedures (Clause 5.2 — IP/SG models)
requirements.description: Certified and non-certified material are physically segregated during storage and processing to prevent mixing.
requirements.guidanceText: Provide written segregation procedures and storage diagrams. Applicable only to Identity Preserved (IP) and Segregated (SG) supply chain models. Not required for Mass Balance (MB) or Book-and-Claim (BC).

requirements.name: Accurate RSPO Claims on Documents (Clause 6.1)
requirements.description: All RSPO claims made on invoices, delivery orders, and supply chain documents are accurate and match the certified supply chain model.
requirements.guidanceText: Review sample invoices and delivery notes for correct RSPO claim language (e.g., 'RSPO MB', 'RSPO SG', 'RSPO IP'). Claims must not exceed certified volumes.

requirements.name: Annual Self-Assessment (Clause 7.1)
requirements.description: An annual internal self-assessment against RSPO SCCS requirements is conducted and documented.
requirements.guidanceText: Complete the RSPO SCCS self-assessment checklist and retain records for at least 3 years. Address any non-conformances identified.
